name: codeyang-vscode
description: AI coding agent — chat with tool-using CodeYang inside VS Code

codeyang.apiKey.description: API Key for CodeYang AI agent (supports DeepSeek, Anthropic)

codeyang.apiBaseUrl.description: API Base URL (DeepSeek Anthropic-compatible: https://api.deepseek.com/anthropic, OpenAI-compatible: https://api.deepseek.com/v1)

codeyang.model.description: Model to use (deepseek-v4-pro for best quality, deepseek-v4-flash for speed, or claude model names for auto-mapping)
